name: @marcosquintino/qa-skills
description: Instalador das skills QA API, QA Chamado, QA Debug Report e Graphify.

scripts.prepare:qa-debug-report: npm run build:faillens && npm run sync:faillens
scripts.check: node --check bin/qa-skills.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-faillens.mjs && node --check qa-debug-report/tools/qa-debug-report.mjs && node bin/qa-skills.mjs --help && node bin/qa-skills.mjs install --help
